name: VesPro LiveZymes
description: LiveZymes is a delicious botanical digestive enzyme beverage in cold spray dried powder form. Produced from 12 different types of fresh food and fruits using advance cold spray drying equipment from Germany with high colloidal mineral glacier water from Mount Rainier USA.
benefits: Natural indigestion remedy and heartburn remedy
Reduces gas, bloating and stomach discomfort
Diminishes food allergies by effective protein digestion
Supports healthy weight loss (via lipase and protease enzymes)
Helps burn fat and eliminate toxins embedded in fats

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet mixed in 125ml water or juice (below 40°C) after food
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet in 125ml water or juice (below 40°C) after food

who_can_consume: Adults seeking digestive support, those with indigestion, gas, bloating, or constipation.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have specific health conditions.

qa.question: How many enzymes does LiveZymes contain?
qa.answer: LiveZymes contains 14 different types of digestive enzymes with specific potencies including Lipase (7000 DU), multiple Proteases, Alpha Amylase (10,000 SKB), Lactase (2000 ALU), and others. The fermentation process takes 14 days.

qa.question: Why are digestive enzymes important?
qa.answer: Cooked food has zero enzymes, so your body must produce huge quantities of digestive enzymes, interrupting the production of metabolic enzymes needed for healthy elimination, nutrient assimilation, and tissue regeneration. Signs of enzyme deficiency include heartburn, gas, constipation, bloating, and chronic fatigue.
